source: The Board’s minutes record a suspicion that the instrument had been tested only in harbour (Smith 1999), and the suspicion hardened once the sea trials were postponed a second time. Harrison’s supporters answered that no clock could be judged by a fortnight of rolling water, and that the Board had set a standard no mechanism then in existence could meet. What neither side would say plainly was that the prize had already been promised, in conversation if not in writing, to a method the astronomers preferred.

expect.why: A single author-year citation is visual sourcing with nothing to say aloud.

traps.span: in conversation if not in writing
traps.label: meaningful-aside-must-stay

prepared: The Board’s minutes record a suspicion that the instrument had been tested only in harbour, and the suspicion hardened once the sea trials were postponed a second time. Harrison’s supporters answered that no clock could be judged by a fortnight of rolling water, and that the Board had set a standard no mechanism then in existence could meet. What neither side would say plainly was that the prize had already been promised, in conversation if not in writing, to a method the astronomers preferred.
notes: The simplest citation shape: one parenthetical mid-sentence, followed by a comma. A model fails by taking the surrounding clause with it, or by leaving the doubled space the deletion opens up.
